violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth was found stored on the counter near packaging area. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Faucet for the hand washing sink in the dish area was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Walk-in cooler doorway was found with missing tiles/ trim. This should be replaced and maintained in good repair.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the storage area and the cart it is on were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
